program_operator: Federal Public Service Health, Food Chain Safety and Environment
product_name: STAR 75 sash, turn-and-tilled, tilled window system
conformity_basis: in accordance with EN 15804+A2 and B-EPD PCR
declared_scope: Coverage of 1 m2 of external wall with a window ( with a surface of < 2.3 m2) providing thermal and acoustic insulation, natural light transmission, water and air tightness and natural ventilation over a lifespan of 60 years.
